---
pagetitle: "AIEPS Day 2026"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}

# AIEPS Day 2026

[Workshop on AI in Earth & Planetary Sciences]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[📅 June 01–02, 2026]{} [📍 Espoo, Finland]{} [🔗 Format details coming soon]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Submit Abstract](#submission-status){.btn-act .primary}
[Register](#submission-status){.btn-act .secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.callout-box #submission-status}
### Abstract Submission

Abstract submission will open soon.
:::

::: {.section-nav}
[Overview](#overview) [Key Dates](#dates) [Venue](#venue)
:::

::: {.content-body}

## Overview {#overview}

**AIEPS Day 2026** is scheduled for June 01-02, 2026 in Espoo, Finland.

- More details on program, speakers, and registration will be announced soon.

## Key Dates {#dates}

| Milestone | Date |
|-----------|------|
| **Workshop Day 1 (Hands-on Exercises)** | **01 June 2026** |
| **Workshop Day 2** | **02 June 2026** |

## Venue {#venue}

**Location:** Espoo, Finland  
**Format:** To be announced

:::
